proposer.label: Proposer
proposer.description: Name of the nation that initiated the route (nation_a or nation_b)

resources_a_to_b.label: Resources A to B
resources_a_to_b.description: Resources sent from nation_a to nation_b each tick

resources_b_to_a.label: Resources B to A
resources_b_to_a.description: Resources sent from nation_b to nation_a each tick

road_distance.label: Road Distance
road_distance.description: Shortest road-tile path length between the two nations at time of creation

delay.label: Delay
delay.description: Transit delay tier: floor(road_distance / max(trade_speed_a, trade_speed_b))

duration_ticks.label: Duration (ticks)
duration_ticks.description: How many ticks to run for; null means indefinite

created_session.label: Created Session
created_session.description: Session counter when proposal was made

accepted_session.label: Accepted Session
accepted_session.description: Session counter when route was accepted

cancel_session.label: Cancel Session
cancel_session.description: Session counter when cancellation was requested

cancelled_by.label: Cancelled By
cancelled_by.description: Name of the nation that cancelled the route

ended_session.label: Ended Session
ended_session.description: Session counter when route fully ended

proposal_note.label: Proposal Note
proposal_note.description: Optional message from the proposer, visible to the accepting nation
